reviews.review_description: This is by FAR the BEST gtag fan game I’ve ever played. IVE been playing since it was called running gorilla. I love the game so much and I wish to become moderator for this incredible game in the future. Pls consider this request  and I look forward to helping others out snd growing the runner ing Gorilla community.
